templates.name: Financing Options
templates.content: We offer Klarna an alternate payment method that allows you to split your purchase into 4 interest-free payments. To use Klarna to pay for your purchase, choose Klarna in the checkout. Your purchase will be split into 4 interest-free payments. The first payment will be taken from your credit or debit card when your order is shipped. The remaining three payments will be automatically charged to your card 14, 28, and 42 days later.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/brunomagliofficial/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/BrunoMagliSpa

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! I'd recommend taking a look at our Size Chart on each product page. If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://www.brunomagli.com/pages/bloomingdales-stores

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at customerservice@brunomagli.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@brunomagli.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at wholesale@brunomagli.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.brunomagli.com/pages/return-policy

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via FedEx and once shipped it will take 7-9 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (800) 887-4061 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.brunomagli.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $200 Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: The return process is completely free.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Please email our post-purchase support team directly at CustomerService@BrunoMagli.com to help with any changes or cancellations to your order.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://brunomagli.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.brunomagli.com/collections/men-sale , https://www.brunomagli.com/collections/women-sale
